best_match.name: Textured Crop
best_match.reason: Enhances face shape and offers a modern, trendy look.

good_options.name: Crew Cut
good_options.reason: Low maintenance and works well with round face shapes.

good_options.name: Caesar Cut
good_options.reason: Accentuates features and is easy to style.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: Versatile and classic, suits the face shape well.

not_recommended.name: Long Slick Back
not_recommended.reason: Can make the face appear wider.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: Incompatible with face shape and not trendy.

analysis.parting_recommendation: Natural side part to add dimension.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Short, textured fringe to complement face shape.

length_options.short_verdict: Best for ease and highlights facial features.
length_options.long_verdict: Not ideal; can overwhelm face shape.

analysis.summary: A textured crop haircut suits the round face shape and complements the natural features. Keeping the hair color dark or cool-toned enhances the overall appearance. Short styles are recommended for easy maintenance and smart look.
care_tips: Use a lightweight styling cream for texture.
Use a sulfate-free shampoo to keep hair soft.
